name: Network Compliance Verification
description: Verifies network compliance by checking network segmentation, firewall ACLs, and routing policies against the organization's network security policy. Collects firewall rules and VLAN configurations, uses Riggs AI to identify segmentation violations and overly permissive rules, then routes findings based on severity. Critical segmentation failures trigger immediate remediation; minor deviations are logged for the next change window.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto Networks
required_integrations.reason: Retrieve firewall rules, ACLs, and security zone configurations for compliance review

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for network compliance violations

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify network and security teams of compliance findings

config.description: Triggers weekly network compliance verification against segmentation and ACL policies
Retrieve all active firewall security rules, ACLs, and their hit counts

config.query: SELECT zone_name, allowed_destinations, blocked_destinations, required_inspection, max_rule_permissiveness, compliance_framework FROM network_segmentation_policy WHERE active = true ORDER BY zone_name
config.description: Load the defined network segmentation policy requirements for comparison

config.additional_instructions: Compare firewall rules against the network segmentation policy. Identify: any-any rules, overly broad source/destination ranges, rules allowing traffic between restricted zones, unused rules (zero hit count > 30 days), and rules missing logging. Check for PCI DSS network segmentation requirements if applicable.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of network compliance against segmentation and ACL policies
Routes based on whether critical network segmentation violations were detected
Create a P1 ticket for critical network segmentation violations
Alert network and security teams of critical segmentation violations

parameters.note: Weekly network compliance check complete. All firewall rules and segmentation policies are compliant. No critical findings. Unused rules flagged for cleanup: {{analyze_1.unused_rule_count}}

config.description: Document compliant network audit result with minor observations
Network compliance verification complete -- segmentation and ACL policies evaluated
